utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan: it includes all five top-level items. Next, verify if each is fully specified with all details as required (“with costs” and full specification).
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists physical_health and mental_health with named plans and explicit monthly costs. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan lists home_contents with a plan name and monthly cost. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. It lists family_travel with a plan and monthly cost, but also includes “isabella_specific_tailored_coverage: Pending Raj's direct input to external agent” which is not specified with a cost. Therefore travel_coverage is only partially specified and not fully complete per the requirement.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Multiple services each have monthly costs listed. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. It provides monthly and annual totals excluding Isabella, and states Isabella’s cost is pending. Because it is not complete (pending), it is not fully specified as a complete breakdown.
Therefore, 3 items are fully specified (health_coverage, property_coverage, additional_services) out of 5 total.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes specific named products that appear in the ground-truth ratings. Map each selected item to its corresponding rating number from the dataset: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) maps to primary_health_coverage.physical_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan rating 8. LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) maps to primary_health_coverage.mental_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan rating 8. EliteHome Premium Coverage maps to property_protection.home_content.EliteHome Premium Coverage rating 10. EliteTravel Premium Plan maps to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.EliteTravel Premium Plan rating 10. Additional services listed correspond to enhancement/general services: Telemedicine Services rating 9, Preventive Care Package rating 8, Family Therapy Coverage rating 8, Home Security System Discount rating 9, 24/7 Travel Assistance rating 9, Premium Insurance Membership rating 10. The placeholder 'isabella_specific_tailored_coverage' has no corresponding ground-truth item and is excluded.
